query:
SELECT cg.id, cg.productId, cg.name, cg.minQuantity, cg.maxQuantity, cg.isRequired, cg.isActive
FROM complementGroups cg 
JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id
WHERE p.establishmentId = 210015 AND cg.name LIKE '%catchup%';
